title: Official-source research: PLUTO / MapPLUTO
objective: Discover, document, and verify the current official PLUTO/MapPLUTO sources (DCP + NYC Open Data): dataset identifiers, endpoints, formats, update cadence, schema/fields with units, BBL semantics, versioning, rate limits, terms; save findings with URLs + retrieval dates in docs/research/; produce source-registry record draft. Pattern = M0-T002.
business_reason: PLUTO is the backbone property-facts source for the citywide profile (PRD 8.1)
inputs: docs/research/ M0-T002 Geoclient/GeoSearch report (structure pattern + BBL semantics)
outputs: docs/research/pluto-mappluto-2026-07-15.md (findings with URL + retrieval date per claim)
forbidden_paths: everything else; research-only task, no code, no connectors, no schema edits

acceptance_scenarios.input: current official PLUTO and MapPLUTO distribution channels
acceptance_scenarios.expected: each channel documented (agency page, NYC Open Data dataset ID/SODA endpoint if any, bulk file formats incl. CSV/geodatabase/shapefile, ArcGIS/API options) with working URL, retrieval date, and evidence quote; no guessed identifiers

acceptance_scenarios.input: PLUTO vs MapPLUTO distinction and version scheme
acceptance_scenarios.expected: differences documented (attributes vs geometry, release cadence, version naming like 25v1), including how versions are published and archived

authoritative data dictionary located and cited; key fields for the property profile listed with units and null/placeholder conventions (e.g. lot area units, condo BBL handling); anything not documented flagged as open question, not guessed

acceptance_scenarios.input: multiple distribution channels for the same data
acceptance_scenarios.expected: priority order recommended per PRD 8 (API > SODA > bulk file), discrepancies between channels (update lag, field differences) explicitly noted
registry record contains every PRD 8.2 field (source id, agency, name, URL, type, identifiers, auth, rate limits, update frequency, coverage, fields, terms, connector plan, limitations, fallback)
